subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath sent down the verse, bestowed the blessing and made manifest the heavenly table, which verily transcendeth all description [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الایه و ارسل النعمه و اظهر المائده و انها فی مقام یعبر
subcodes.subjects: @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
